'''Gowdawl''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] to which the [[Koqus liner]] ''[[Star Morning]]'', fully loaded with passengers, was headed from [[Motexx]]. The ship never arrived, rather appearing at [[Arat Fraca]] empty of passengers 300 days later.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}
